training_status: active (long walks, brisk intervals, uphill trails)

benefits.description: Food noise dropped, felt in control of appetite within first month
Dropped 22 lbs over the course of treatment
Went from 2 meals per day to 1 main meal in 90-minute window, portion sizes came down naturally, fullness kicked in earlier

protocol_notes: Started at 3 mg weekly, titrated up to 5 mg after 6 weeks, then to 8 mg maintenance. Ordered from US supplier. Used BAC water and syringes. Tracked all doses in PepTracker app with site rotation and notes. Diet: lean proteins, vegetables, carbs, occasional treats (homemade frozen yogurt). Previous diet attempts: Paleo, Keto, Intermittent Fasting (all resulted in weight regain).
